thesis_claim: Schizophrenia is not marked off from ordinary life by the presence of hallucinations or strange beliefs — those are common — but by their persistence, conviction, and cost; the diagnostic line is real, yet it is a threshold on a continuum, not a wall.
the_risk: State the continuum openly on the condition where self-diagnosis is most tempting; render criteria as clinician-view only, never a checklist.

block_plan.content: Open on how common anomalous experience is (PE lifetime 5.8% cross-national; 7.2% prevalence in meta-analysis) vs ~0.7% morbid risk. The line is not 'does this happen to you'. Do NOT let this become self-diagnosis; frame as continuum.
Duration, conviction, distress, functional impact — as what clinicians weigh. NO checklist. Regier only frames reliability (no schizophrenia-specific kappa).

rows: Schizotypal PD — a trait/spectrum pattern, not an episode (lifetime 3.9%)
Brief psychotic / schizophreniform — duration thresholds; least stable diagnoses (schizophreniform stability 0.29, brief/acute 0.56, mostly re-diagnosed as schizophrenia)
Substance-induced psychosis — hard, consequential; measurable transition (32.2% overall, 47.4% cannabis-induced [Starzer]; 46% 8-yr after cannabis [Niemi])
Schizoaffective / bipolar-with-psychosis — mood is the discriminator (36% of schizoaffective re-diagnosed; stability 0.72)

block_plan.content: A short note reinforcing that these distinctions are clinician judgments over time, not a self-test.

stats: M/F incidence rate ratio 1.40; onset sex gap only ~1.07 yr and not significant in some meta-analyses — do NOT overstate a large sex gap

block_plan.myth: Schizophrenia means a 'split personality' — two people in one body.
block_plan.fact: That is dissociative identity disorder, a different condition. Bleuler's 'schizo-' named a split BETWEEN psychic functions (thought, emotion, perception), not between persons.

block_plan.content: One onward path — to Part 2 (Signs and Experiences) and/or a relevant tool.

enrich.summary: IN-ARTICLE (P1 is the only part that renders summary)
